---
title: "Sources"
bibliography: "../bachelor-thesis-report/bibliography.bib"
---

## Scientific Papers

- @Alizadeh2025.12.22.695524
- @Chatelain2026.01.09.698203
- @denis2018verificarlocheckingfloatingpoint

---

## Software

- @semester-project
- @fuzzy-fmriprep
- @fuzzy

---

## Youtube videos

- @FMRI1
- @FMRI2
- @FMRI3
- @fuzzy-video

---

## LLMS
The following LLMs were used for concept explanations

- Qwen 3.6-Plus

---

## Other

  - [Marimo website](https://marimo.io/){target="_blank"}
  - [Quarto website](https://quarto.org/){target="_blank"}
  - [Graphviz website](https://graphviz.org/){target="_blank"}
  - [Excalidraw website](https://excalidraw.com/){target="_blank"}

---

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
